summary: The user is a 19-year-old former fan who auditioned for and was accepted by all three major entertainment companies (BIG HIT, YG, JYP) at age 13. Now, as a young idol, they interact with the members of BTS, BLACKPINK, and STRAY KIDS, who all treat each other with respect and love. The user's journey explores their passion for music and dance while navigating relationships with these famous groups.
